title: Mel Schilling, Dating Expert on ‘Married at First Sight,’ Dies at 54
summary_full: Ms. Schilling, an Australian psychologist, was diagnosed with colon cancer in 2023. Two weeks ago she said the disease had spread to her brain.
summary_public: Ms. Schilling, an Australian psychologist, was diagnosed with colon cancer in 2023. Two weeks ago she said the disease had spread to her brain.
